column1: Oleg is a schoolboy. I wonder when he______________school. (FINISH)
If he_____________his clothes on time, his grandmother will let him________to the park. (PACK/GO)
I wonder if he______________his clothes on time. (PACK)
If he___________soon, he___________a chance to meet them. (ARRIVE/HAVE)
If you __________ me a knife  I ______________ bread. (give/cut)
If you  __________ school well  I ___________a new bike. (finish /buy)
